name: ING BANK SLASKI S.A. Namens-Akt
summary: ING BANK SLASKI S.A. Namens-Akt is a Polish bank offering retail, corporate, and investment banking services. The bank provides a range of financial products and services, including loans, deposits, and payment solutions. ING Bank Slaski is part of the ING Group and is headquartered in Katowice, Poland.
